name: Gemini Space Station, Inc.
business: Gemini is a trusted cryptocurrency platform that provides secure financial infrastructure for individuals and institutions to buy, sell, trade, and store crypto assets, as well as offer staking, a stablecoin, a credit card, and prediction markets.

exposures.sentence: Our products and services include spot and derivatives trading, staking, an over-the-counter (OTC) trading desk, institutional-grade custody, a New York Department of Financial Services (NYDFS)-regulated stablecoin (GUSD), a U.S. credit card, and a prediction markets platform.

catalysts.event: Launch of Gemini Predictions, a CFTC-regulated prediction markets platform
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we launched Gemini Predictions, a CFTC-regulated prediction markets platform offered through our affiliate Gemini Titan, LLC (Gemini Titan), which holds a Designated Contract Market (DCM) license.

catalysts.event: Discontinuation of Nifty Gateway digital art and NFT marketplace
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we discontinued Nifty Gateway to focus on our core exchange and prediction markets businesses.

catalysts.event: Regulatory approval received to offer staking services in New York, with launch in February 2026
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received regulatory approval to offer staking services in New York and launched in that jurisdiction in February.

catalysts.event: Announcement of plans to exit and wind down operations in certain international markets (UK, EU, Australia)
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced plans to exit and wind down operations in certain international markets, including the United Kingdom, the European Union (E.U.) and other European jurisdictions, and Australia, which will reduce our international footprint and allow us to focus more resources on our operations in the United States.

catalysts.event: Reduction to workforce of up to approximately 200 global employees
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced a reduction to our workforce of up to approximately 200 global employees.
